title: Save the White Whale!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo helps rescue a rare white whale and turns the polluted bay into a protected park! 🐋

q.en: Who is Petunia Pretty Paws in the story?
q.zh: 故事里的佩图妮娅·美爪是谁？

options.en: A TV reporter who loves animals and nature
options.zh: 一位热爱动物和自然的电视记者

options.en: The manager of the beach hotel

explain.en: Petunia Pretty Paws is a TV reporter who always defends the environment, nature, and animals, and she has a crush on Geronimo.
explain.zh: 佩图妮娅·美爪是一位电视记者，总是保护自然环境与动物，而且她暗恋杰罗尼摩。

q.en: What name do the children give to the beached white whale?
q.zh: 孩子们给那头搁浅的白鲸起了什么名字？

explain.en: Benjamin suggests they name the whale Hope, and Petunia whispers that she hopes Hope makes it.
explain.zh: 本杰明建议大家给鲸鱼起名叫希望，佩图妮娅也轻声说希望它能活下来。

q.en: What kind of whale is Hope?
q.zh: 希望是一头什么样的鲸鱼？

explain.en: Petunia explains Hope is an extremely rare white humpback whale; it is white because it is an albino with no melanin.
explain.zh: 佩图妮娅解释说希望是一头极为罕见的白色座头鲸，它因为白化、体内没有黑色素才全身雪白。

q.en: Who took over the Whales and Tails hotel from Miss Sweetcakes?
q.zh: 是谁从甜糕小姐手里接管了“海边鲸鱼与尾巴旅馆”？

options.zh: 粗鲁的经理菲尼亚斯·脏毛
蒂娜·路易丝·抱抱毛医生
三位爱管闲事的老太太

explain.en: A surly gray rat named Phineas Filthyfur is behind the desk as manager and says Miss Sweetcakes no longer runs the place.
explain.zh: 一只名叫菲尼亚斯·脏毛、态度粗暴的灰老鼠坐在前台当经理，并说甜糕小姐不再管理旅馆了。

q.en: What project does Geronimo start to protect the bay?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩为了保护海湾发起了什么计划？

explain.en: Geronimo publishes a special edition and launches 'Project Save the White Whale' to collect signatures making the bay a protected park.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩出版了特刊，并发起“拯救白鲸计划”，收集签名，让海湾成为受保护的公园。

q.en: Who leads the rescue team that saves the beached whale?
q.zh: 是谁带领救援队救了搁浅的鲸鱼？

options.zh: 蒂娜·路易丝·抱抱毛医生

explain.en: Petunia's friend Dr. Tina Louise Cuddlefur, nicknamed Dr. TLC, is in charge of the rescue team and examines Hope.
explain.zh: 佩图妮娅的朋友蒂娜·路易丝·抱抱毛医生（绰号抱抱毛医生）负责救援队，并检查了希望的情况。

q.en: Where do Geronimo and his friends go on vacation?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和朋友们去哪里度假？

explain.en: Geronimo invites Petunia to the Bay of Whales, a childhood vacation spot he used to visit with his cousins and sister.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩邀请佩图妮娅去鲸鱼湾，那是他小时候和表兄弟姐妹、妹妹一起度假的地方。

q.en: What instrument do they use to listen to the whales underwater?
q.zh: 他们用什么仪器在水下听鲸鱼的声音？

explain.en: The book explains a hydrophone, made from a microphone, battery, and recording headphones, is used to hear whales' sounds underwater.
explain.zh: 书中介绍说，水听器由麦克风、电池和带录音功能的耳机组成，用来听水下鲸鱼的叫声。

q.en: What does the Environmental Protection Agency finally declare the Bay of Whales to be?
q.zh: 环境保护局最后把鲸鱼湾宣布成了什么？

explain.en: After checking the claims, the agency declares the Bay of Whales a precious treasure and a Protected Marine Park.
explain.zh: 在核实情况后，环境保护局认定鲸鱼湾是珍贵的宝藏，并把它宣布为海洋保护公园。

q.en: Why is an albino animal like Hope white instead of its normal color?
q.zh: 为什么像希望这样的白化动物是白色的，而不是普通颜色？

options.en: Its body does not produce melanin
options.zh: 因为它的身体不产生黑色素
因为它在肥皂水里游过

options.en: It was born in the winter

explain.en: Petunia explains albinos have no color in their skin because their bodies do not produce melanin.
explain.zh: 佩图妮娅解释说，白化动物皮肤没有颜色，是因为身体无法产生黑色素。
